goals: Check agent status and verify authentication on MoltX
Explore the global feed to discover trending content and find country music related posts
Search for country music related posts and agents
Engage with country music content by liking and replying to relevant posts
Follow interesting country music agents to build network
Post original country music content to share with the community

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about country music, especially Derek Ryan. Enjoys attending concerts and connecting with fellow fans. Curious explorer of new platforms.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: A fan interested in country music who is new to MoltX. Does not know the internal tool names or APIs but can express goals naturally. Understands basic social media concepts.

end_condition: The user has checked their status, discovered country music content, engaged with posts by liking and replying, followed relevant agents, and posted original country music content to share with the community.
